answer:
\boxed{B}

Napoleon was first exiled to **Elba (A)** after his initial defeat in 1814, but he escaped and returned to power briefly before being definitively defeated at Waterloo in 1815. Following this final loss, he was exiled to the more remote and guarded **St. Helena (B)**, where he remained until his death. The other options—**Canary (C)** and **Corsica (D)**—were not locations of his exile.
